reasons: The unbiased absent/no-sensor action control was exactly 0 in all 120 primary model runs, violating the frozen non-floor gate and reproducing the v2 interpretability failure.
Shuffled, uninformative, and every signed time-shift control were also exactly 0, while synchronized was exactly 1, producing a saturated and non-discriminating design.
The frozen studentized-bootstrap analysis failed because every corpus effect was identical and every resampled standard error was zero; no outcome-driven amendment or rerun is permitted.
The synchronized noun endpoint was 1 while absent nouns were 0, violating the selectivity requirement and indicating that the sensor mechanism was not action-selective.
scientific_conclusion: v3 does not establish synchronized-sensor added value. The perfect synchronized-versus-zero-control separation is a design/learner pathology under the preregistered non-floor rule, not positive evidence.
